faq.question: <p>What is the overall height of the swing door curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Height of 105 inches (90 inches of 18 oz blue coated vinyl material with a 15 inch black heavy duty scuff material ready to trim to fit)</p>

faq.question: <p>Can I order custom labeling on my curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, we can add your trailer numbers or name to one or both panels.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the overall width of the side door curtain?</p>
<p>What is the overall height of the side door curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Height of 96 inches (78 inches of 18 oz blue coated vinyl material with a 15 inch black heavy duty scuff material ready to trim to fit)</p>

faq.question: <p>Can I also order a universal curtain for my side door?</p>
faq.answer: <p>ITW Insulated has a side door application with a single panel.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the overall width of the swing out curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Per panel 52.50 inches giving a total material width of 105 inches</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the overall width of the roll up curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Per panel 52.50 inches giving a total material width of 105 inches</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the overall height of the roll up curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Height 93 inches ( 78 inches of 18 oz blue coated vinyl material with a 15 inch black heavy duty scuff material ready to trim to fit)</p>

faq.question: <p>What type of hardware is included in the roll up and swing door application?</p>
faq.answer: <p>8 foot roller track, 2 curtain panels with windows, 1 each portable bracket sidewall left and right, 2 plain end stops, 2 webbing Velcro tie backs.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the standard clear window size?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The clear window is 2’ x 4’ on all of the universal curtain styles</p>

faq.question: <p>Can I order a universal curtain without a window?</p>
faq.answer: <p>You can order the curtain without the windows but the lead time may be longer.</p>

faq.question: <p>Will it fit any roll up or swing-out door trailer or truck?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Because the Universal Curtain will fit any roll up or swing-out door vehicle there is no need to determine vehicle dimensions in advance.</p>

faq.question: <p>Do I have to order the installation hardware separate for the Universal Curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Universal Curtain comes as a kit with all parts included.</p>

faq.question: <p>Does the Universal Curtain maintain a certain temperature?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The curtains are not designed to maintain temperature but to assist in preventing cold air loss. By doing so you are assisting in maintaining the temperature.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the main purpose of the Universal curtains?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The universal curtain can help reduce fuel cost by preventing cold air loss when the trailer doors are open.</p>
